title: viguiera excelsa
intro: Viguiera excelsa, also known as tree marigold, is a flowering plant native to the Americas, particularly in the Andes mountain range. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Viguiera excelsa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Viguiera excelsa can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
